title: All-American Co-Ed
writer: Cortland Fitzsimmons, Kenneth Higgins, LeRoy Prinz
actors: Frances Langford, Johnny Downs, Marjorie Woodworth
plot: All-girl school Mar Brynn tries to get more pupils and publicity by making fun of the Quincton college. For revenge, the boys there sent Bob Sheppard to Mar Brynn, dressed as a girl, to give them a slight scandal.
